obligations.obligation:
It is further stipulated
that Maheshwaram Transmission Private Limited shall remain unequivocally bound by
the terms and conditions of the inter-State transmission licence originally granted to
Maheshwaram Transmission Limited, provisions of the Transmission Service
Agreement, Transmission Licence R...

Except for the name, there shall be no
change in the terms and conditions of the licence.

Let an extract copy of this order be sent to the Central Government (the Ministry
of Power), the Central Electricity Authority and the Central Transmission Utility of India
Limited in terms of sub-section (7) of Section 15 of the Electricity Act, 2003, for their
information and record.
